name: add_beneficiary
_note: add_beneficiary designates an heir on the caller's in-memory estate. name is required (missing_name). sharePct is structurally clamped to [0,100] via Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(...)||0)) — a poisoned/absurd value (9999, Infinity, NaN) can NEVER store a raw out-of-range share; it pins to 100 (or 0 for NaN), so list_beneficiaries.totalSharePct can never exceed the number-of-heirs * 100 and remainderPct stays in [0,100]. This is the wealth-split path; the clamp is the fail-CLOSED guarantee that no single heir can claim more than the whole estate.
